title: East Anglia One North and East Anglia Two Offshore Windfarms Red-Throated Diver Implementation and Monitoring Plan: post-consent condition discharge, Planning Act 2008
body: "Decision by the Secretary of State on an application by ScottishPower Renewables to approve the Red-Throated Diver Implementation and Monitoring Plan (RTDIMP) of the East Anglia One North and East Anglia Two offshore windfarms.  Date of Decision  5 August 2025  Company / Location   ScottishPower RenewablesScottishPower House320 Vincent StGlasgowG2 5AD   Type of Project  Post-consent condition discharge of the East Anglia One North Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022 and the East Anglia Two Offshore Wind Farm Order 2022, as made under the Planning Act 2008.  Maximum Output  N/A  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
